arts.ttl: Juventus Enter Race to Sign Chelsea’s Renato Veiga
arts.sum: Juventus have emerged as a serious contender in the pursuit of Chelsea defender Renato Veiga, signalling the start of a potentially significant transfer saga for the 21-year-old Portuguese talent. arts.ttl: Report: Chelsea have now made contact to sign player Arsenal sold for just £7m in July
Report: Joao Felix eyed by ‘very interested club’ as Rashford’s situation becomes clear
arts.sum: AC Milan are now reportedly very interested in Chelsea attacker Joao Felix. The Serie A giants are eyeing a move for the Portugal international, Sky Germany has suggested. Felix had moved to Chelsea just over the summer from Atletico Madrid. arts.ttl: Chelsea transfer news: Former Arsenal man enters conversation during Casadei talks?
arts.sum: Chelsea allegedly request information on a former Arsenal defender as they continue to hold discussions regarding the future of Cesare Casadei.

arts.ttl: Team News: Chelsea vs. Wolverhampton Wanderers injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Monday's Premier League clash between Chelsea and Wolverhampton Wanderers.

arts.ttl: Chelsea land huge Liam Delap transfer breakthrough as Pep Guardiola makes special Man City plan
arts.sum: Delap, who sees his contract at Portman Road expire in June 2029, has already featured 20 times for Ipswich in the Premier League this season, scoring eight goals and providing two assists in the process . Maresca, who also coached Delap in City's academy, reunited with the striker when Ipswich defeat Chelsea 2-0 at Portman Road last month.

arts.ttl: Chelsea star 'agrees' January transfer exit after Alejandro Garnacho bid submitted - Kieran Horn
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku, Joao Felix and Axel Disasi are among the senior stars linked to mid-season departures, while Mathys Tel, Alejandro Garnacho and Jamie Gittens have become concrete targets for Enzo Maresca as the Blues look to sign a new winger . With that being said, football.london has taken a look at the latest Blues transfer rumours, news and updates.

arts.ttl: Jamie Gittens Chelsea transfer and the secret weapon Enzo Maresca has to secure £84.5m deal
arts.sum: Drawing comparisons with Sancho after making the move from Manchester City to Dortmund and also playing from the left-wing, the pair are in fact friends and former teammates following the player's return to Germany last season. When it comes to Gittens, who Dortmund are believed to value at €100million (£84.5m), current Chelsea loanee Jadon Sancho could prove key if the west London club are to launch a move for the Dortmund ace.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho has already sent Jamie Gittens message amid Chelsea transfer interest
arts.sum: Sancho is someone Gittens looks up to, with the Dortmund winger admitting last summer that he has learned a lot from someone he considers a friend. Like a certain Jadon Sancho, who has taken an eerily similar path in senior football as Gittens, Borussia Dortmund came calling and poached the winger.
